author: m.kalinin
content:
<@755590043632140352> let's continue here:
> I think we should send that FCU only when proposing

Does that mean no FCUs by attesters?

author: potuz
content: exactly. In the normal scenario it would mean to send FCU only on payload insertions

author: potuz
content: but not simply on slot advance

author: potuz
content: So, **only** send that FCU that causes a rollback if it goes with Payload attributes. This way that FCU is simply a hint to trigger block production more than a rollback
